name: powercat-overpage
description: Reviews the Power Pages site(s) inside a Power Platform solution .zip against best practices across Security, Performance, Accessibility, Maintainability, Architecture and Reliability, by reading the pages/templates/custom code/settings/permissions and reasoning about them (AI-authored, no analyzer). Optionally ingests a browser HAR capture to investigate real performance bottlenecks and map them to code. Produces a [SolutionName].findings.json (solution + per-site + per-component findings with descriptions, fixes and code/HAR anchors), then opens the PowerCAT OverPage viewer with the solution, findings and HAR loaded so the user can explore findings overlaid on a live page preview, on the actual code, and on the network waterfall.
